message:
🐛 Align 25 card layouts to DeploymentStatus gold standard

* 🐛 Align 13 card layouts to DeploymentStatus gold standard (batch 1)

Cards fixed: ActiveAlerts, AlertRules, ClusterCosts, ClusterHealth,
ClusterResourceTree, GatewayStatus, HelmValuesDiff, OpenCostOverview,
OverlayComparison, ServiceExports, ServiceImports, UpgradeStatus,
WorkloadDeployment.

Standard layout: LEFT=[Count] RIGHT=[ClusterFilter][CardControls][Refresh]
with Search input below and optional status filter pills.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Align GitHubActivity and UserManagement card layouts (batch 2)

GitHubActivity: Added search input, count badge, reordered controls.
UserManagement: Added count badge, cluster filter, moved tabs to Row 3.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Align 9 more card layouts to DeploymentStatus gold standard (batch 3)

Cards fixed: ArgoCDApplications, GPUStatus, HelmHistory,
KustomizationStatus, NamespaceEvents, NamespaceQuotas,
NamespaceRBAC, OPAPolicies, PVCStatus.

- Added cluster filter dropdowns (useChartFilters) to cards missing them
- Added LEFT count badges where missing
- Added search input to GPUStatus
- Moved ExternalLink buttons after RefreshButton in ArgoCD/OPA
- Replaced loading spinners with count badges in Namespace cards
- Moved Add Quota button after RefreshButton in NamespaceQuotas

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Align RSSFeed and WorkloadDetectionCards to gold standard (batch 4)

RSSFeed: Moved search to full-width Row 2, added count badge.
WorkloadDetectionCards: Added search inputs to ProwJobs, ProwHistory,
LLMInference, and MLJobs sub-components. Added count badge to ProwHistory.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
